name: image_generate
description: Generate images using DALL-E or compatible API.
description_for_agent: Generate an image from a text description using DALL-E or compatible API. Parameters: prompt (string, required — detailed image description), size (string, optional — '1024x1024', '1792x1024', '1024x1792'; default '1024x1024'), quality (string, optional — 'standard' or 'hd'; default 'standard'), style (string, optional — 'natural' or 'vivid'; default 'vivid'). Returns an image URL. Use this for creative tasks, thumbnails, diagrams.
